attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who targets stage wins over GC, capable of surviving category 1 climbs but focuses on getting into early moves rather than late explosive attacks.
team_tactics: Minimal team support evident - operates as independent breakaway hunter rather than protected rider, suggesting domestique role or freedom in non-threatening GC situations.
terrain_preference: Handles category 1 climbs adequately in breakaways and excels on technical finishing circuits with tight turns and short uphill finishes; avoids pure mountain stages.
vulnerability: Multi-day fatigue accumulation causes repeated weak moments, suggesting poor recovery or limited stage race conditioning beyond 2-3 consecutive hard efforts.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist: both stage win and noted escape attempts from breakaways (2 observations)
Multi-day fatigue vulnerability: identical weak moments on consecutive days (2 observations)
Targets races with weaker GC fields for dangerous moves (2 observations)
Technical finishers suit him: won with 180-degree turn into uphill (1 observation but specific)
form_trajectory: unknown: large 4-year gap between 2018 negative signals and 2022 breakthrough win makes trajectory impossible to assess reliably
